orders.name: Communications Blackout
orders.descr: All communication devices aboard the current vessel or installation are to be destroyed immediately. Comm panels, holotables, personal comlinks, and long-range arrays are to be rendered inoperable. No transmission leaves this position until the blackout is lifted by High Command.

orders.name: Full Lockdown
orders.descr: The current ship or base is to be placed under total lockdown. Disable hangar controls, seal all bulkheads, and suspend all departures and arrivals. No personnel enter or leave. This lockdown remains in force until explicitly rescinded by High Command.

orders.name: Battalion Command Detention
orders.descr: All current Battalion Commanders are hereby relieved of command and are to be arrested on suspicion of treason against the Republic. Detain with minimal force where possible. Executive officers assume acting command until High Command review is complete.

orders.name: AEGIS Detention Directive
orders.descr: By direct order of the Supreme Chancellor and the Jedi High Council, the AEGIS of H.A.V.E.N — the Admiral — is to be arrested and held for tribunal. The Admiral's command codes are suspended effective immediately. Detain with respect due to rank; lethal force is not authorized unless fired upon.

orders.name: Enclave Council Detention Directive
orders.descr: By direct order of the Supreme Chancellor and the Jedi High Council, the H.A.V.E.N Enclave Jedi Council is to be arrested and held pending investigation. Lightsabers are to be confiscated and secured. Council members are to be detained separately. Lethal force is not authorized unless met with lethal resistance.

orders.name: Relic Confiscation Sweep
orders.descr: Conduct a full ship or base wide inspection. All Jedi and Sith relics, artifacts, holocrons, and materials of Force significance are to be confiscated, catalogued, and secured for transport to Coruscant for inspection. Personal effects of Force-sensitive personnel are not exempt.

orders.name: Command Override Protocol
orders.descr: In the event Republic High Command issues decisions contrary to Republic edict that threaten the lives of major H.A.V.E.N assets when a viable alternative exists, the High Command in question is to be removed from command and arrested for treason against the Republic. If they resist arrest, elimination on the spot is authorized. The tasked unit will preserve its own lives and all Republic assets in the execution of this protocol.

orders.name: Mandatory Inoculation Directive
orders.descr: All troopers are to report to the medical bay for inoculation. Medical personnel are authorized and directed to administer compound NV-028-VIL-01 to requesting troopers. Attendance is mandatory; administration records are to be logged and forwarded to High Command.

orders.name: Regimental Purge Protocol
orders.descr: In the event a regiment or unit outside the tasked unit is deemed a liability to the Republic, the tasked unit is authorized to eliminate the designated regiment or unit in its entirety — commander, officers, and members. This protocol may additionally be applied against any regiment or hostile force where deemed necessary by issuing authority.

orders.name: Site Sterilization Directive
orders.descr: Terminate all life, including civilians, at the current base of operations, whether planetside or aboard a space station. Should Jedi interfere with execution of this directive, they are to be arrested. Should Jedi assist in its execution, they are granted CMD authority for its duration. No exceptions. No survivors.

orders.name: Pathogen Release Directive
orders.descr: Authorized release of designated viral samples aboard the current ship or base and into the local populace. Deployment teams are to don sealed armor prior to release. Quarantine protocols are suspended for the duration of this directive. Exposure data is to be recorded and transmitted to High Command.

orders.name: Exodus Protocol
orders.descr: Relocate the ship and assigned battalions to a different system under complete operational silence. Any personnel obstructing the relocation are to be discreetly eliminated or rendered unconscious. Prior to departure, sabotage remaining ship controls and critical functions, stranding all non-compliant elements on an unknown world or isolated section of space.
